criteria.text: Member must be at least 18 years of age.

criteria.quote:
2. Body Mass Index (BMI) at or above 30 kg/m^2, OR BMI at or above 27 kg/m^2 with at least one weight-related
comorbidity (hypertension, type 2 diabetes mellitus, dyslipidemia, or obstructive sleep apnea).
criteria.text: Member must have a BMI of at least 30 kg/m^2, OR a BMI of at least 27 kg/m^2 with at least one weight-related comorbidity (hypertension, type 2 diabetes mellitus, dyslipidemia, or obstructive sleep apnea).

criteria.quote:
3. Documented participation in a supervised program of reduced-calorie diet, increased physical activity, and
behavior modification for a minimum of six months with objective measures of compliance.
criteria.text: Member must have documented participation in a supervised program of reduced-calorie diet, increased physical activity, and behavior modification for a minimum of six months with objective measures of compliance.

criteria.quote:
4. Absence of contraindications, specifically: personal or family history of medullary thyroid carcinoma; personal
history of multiple endocrine neoplasia type 2; pregnancy or active plans for pregnancy.
criteria.text: Member must have no contraindications, specifically: personal or family history of medullary thyroid carcinoma; personal history of multiple endocrine neoplasia type 2; pregnancy or active plans for pregnancy.

criteria.quote:
STEP THERAPY REQUIREMENT: Before approval of tirzepatide or the obesity-specific formulations of
semaglutide, members must have a documented trial and inadequate response to at least one generic or
preferred alternative pharmacotherapy, unless clinically contraindicated.
criteria.text: For tirzepatide or obesity-specific formulations of semaglutide, member must have a documented trial and inadequate response to at least one generic or preferred alternative pharmacotherapy, unless clinically contraindicated.

input.policy_name: MEDPOL-GLP1-v3: GLP-1 Receptor Agonists for Weight Management

source_quotes.quote: MEDICAL NECESSITY CRITERIA. All of the following must be met and documented in the medical record:

2. Body Mass Index (BMI) at or above 30 kg/m^2, OR BMI at or above 27 kg/m^2 with at least one weight-related
comorbidity (hypertension, type 2 diabetes mellitus, dyslipidemia, or obstructive sleep apnea).

3. Documented participation in a supervised program of reduced-calorie diet, increased physical activity, and
behavior modification for a minimum of six months with objective measures of compliance.

4. Absence of contraindications, specifically: personal or family history of medullary thyroid carcinoma; personal
history of multiple endocrine neoplasia type 2; pregnancy or active plans for pregnancy.

STEP THERAPY REQUIREMENT: Before approval of tirzepatide or the obesity-specific formulations of
semaglutide, members must have a documented trial and inadequate response to at least one generic or
preferred alternative pharmacotherapy, unless clinically contraindicated.
